mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material (material_id, material_name, material_type, unit, unit_price, storage_method, warehouse_code, lot_flag, supply_unit, use_yn) VALUES (#{materialId}, #{materialName}, #{materialType}, #{unit}, #{unitPrice}, #{storageMethod}, #{warehouseCode}, #{lotFlag}, #{supplyUnit}, #{useYn})
mapper.update: UPDATE material SET material_name = #{materialName}, material_type = #{materialType}, unit = #{unit}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, storage_method = #{storageMethod}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode}, lot_flag = #{lotFlag}, supply_unit = #{supplyUnit}, unit_usage_per_pack = #{unitUsagePerPack}, use_yn = #{useYn} WHERE material_id = #{materialId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM material ORDER BY material_name
